en: So, did you finish the whole thing, or you have to go somewhere?
ko: 그래서 전체를 다 끝냈나요, 아니면 어디 가야 하나요?

en: I have to go somewhere. But I finished the whole thing, too.
ko: 어디 가야 하지만, 전체도 다 끝냈어요. 아, 좋네요. 당신은요?

en: How did you feel about the graphs?
I struggled with the essay question on the back.
